Python.title: Python Basics
Python.description: Variables, data types, control flow, functions.
Python.interview_tips: Know built-in types, mutability, and common built-in functions.

Python.title: OOP in Python
Python.interview_tips: Explain dunder methods, class vs instance variables.

Python.title: Python Standard Library
Python.description: os, sys, re, json, datetime, collections, itertools.
Python.interview_tips: Know common modules and when to use them.

Python.title: File Handling & Error Handling
Python.interview_tips: Know context managers (with statement) and exception hierarchy.

Python.title: Async Python
Python.interview_tips: Know difference between threading, multiprocessing, asyncio.

Python.title: Build a Python Project
Python.description: Create a CLI tool, web scraper, or automation script.
Python.interview_tips: Be ready to demo a project and explain your design choices.

Django.title: Django Setup & Structure
Django.description: Install Django, create project/app, understand MTV pattern.
Django.interview_tips: Explain MTV vs MVC, Django's request-response cycle.

Django.title: Models & ORM
Django.interview_tips: Know select_related vs prefetch_related, N+1 problem.

Django.title: Views & URL Routing
Django.description: Function-based views, class-based views, URL patterns.
Django.interview_tips: Know when to use CBVs vs FBVs.

Django.title: Templates & Forms
Django.description: Template language, forms, model forms, validation.
Django.interview_tips: Explain CSRF protection and form validation flow.

Django.title: REST APIs with Django REST Framework
Deploy Django App
Django.description: Gunicorn, Nginx, PostgreSQL, environment variables, WhiteNoise.
Django.interview_tips: Know DEBUG=False implications, static file serving in production.

JavaScript.title: JS Fundamentals
JavaScript.interview_tips: Know var/let/const differences, hoisting, type coercion.

JavaScript.title: DOM Manipulation
JavaScript.description: querySelector, event listeners, classList, data attributes.

JavaScript.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
JavaScript.interview_tips: Explain Promise chain vs async/await, error handling.

JavaScript.title: ES6+ Features
JavaScript.description: Destructuring, spread, modules, classes, template literals.
JavaScript.interview_tips: Know all major ES6+ syntax and when to use them.

JavaScript.title: Build a JS Project
JavaScript.description: Create a todo app, weather app, or quiz game.
JavaScript.interview_tips: Be ready to explain your code architecture.

Machine Learning.title: Math Foundations
Machine Learning.description: Linear algebra, statistics, probability, calculus basics.
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Know matrix operations, probability distributions, Bayes theorem.

Machine Learning.title: Python for ML
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Know vectorization, DataFrame operations, data visualization.

Machine Learning.title: Supervised Learning
Machine Learning.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, SVMs.
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Explain bias-variance tradeoff, regularization, evaluation metrics.

Machine Learning.title: Unsupervised Learning
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Know when to use each algorithm and how to select k.

Machine Learning.title: Deep Learning
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Explain activation functions, optimizers, batch normalization.

Machine Learning.title: Model Deployment
Machine Learning.interview_tips: Know how to serve models, handle drift, and monitor performance.

SQL.title: SQL Basics
SQL.description: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, WHERE, ORDER BY.
SQL.interview_tips: Know all basic CRUD operations and filtering.

SQL.title: Joins & Relationships
SQL.description: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER JOIN, self-joins.
SQL.interview_tips: Draw diagrams, explain JOIN types and when to use each.

SQL.title: Aggregations & Grouping
SQL.description: GROUP BY, HAVING, COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX.

SQL.title: Subqueries & CTEs
SQL.description: Correlated subqueries, WITH clauses, window functions.
SQL.interview_tips: Know ROW_NUMBER, RANK, PARTITION BY, LAG/LEAD.

SQL.title: Indexing & Optimization
SQL.description: Indexes, query plans, EXPLAIN, performance tuning.
SQL.interview_tips: Know when indexes help/hurt, composite indexes, covering indexes.

SQL.title: Practice SQL
SQL.description: Solve 50+ problems on LeetCode and HackerRank.
SQL.interview_tips: Practice medium-hard problems, focus on window functions.

React.title: React Basics
React.description: JSX, components, props, state with useState.
React.interview_tips: Know functional vs class components, one-way data flow.

React.title: Hooks
React.interview_tips: Explain useEffect dependencies array and cleanup.

React.title: Component Patterns
React.description: Lifting state, composition, controlled components, portals.

React.title: React Router
React.description: Client-side routing, Route, Link, useNavigate, useParams.
React.interview_tips: Know nested routes, protected routes, lazy loading.

React.title: State Management
React.interview_tips: Know when to use local state vs global state.

React.title: Build & Deploy a React App
React.description: Vite, performance optimization, deployment to Vercel/Netlify.
React.interview_tips: Know React.memo, useMemo, useCallback for optimization.

default.title: Learn the Fundamentals
default.description: Study the core concepts and syntax.

default.title: Build a Project
default.description: Create a small real-world project using this skill.
default.interview_tips: Have a project you can demo and explain.

default.title: Study Advanced Topics
default.description: Deepen your knowledge with advanced patterns.
